## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (this project is issue-first)
- [ ] Single, focused commit (squashed)
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make generate` produces no diff (ran it after any `api/` change)
- [ ] `make test-unit` passes; tests/docs updated as needed
- [ ] Commit is signed off (`git commit -s` — DCO)
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under the project's BSD-3-Clause license
